nl_query: For each published result, show the script URN, student name, final marks, computation rule, the list of source attempt types used, the evaluator names for those attempts, and whether the result has been reconciled with ERP.
failed_sql: SELECT r.script_id, sc.name AS student_name, r.final_marks, r.computation_rule, ARRAY(SELECT ea.attempt_type FROM evaluation_attempt ea WHERE ea.id = ANY(r.source_attempt_ids)) AS source_attempt_types, fc.display_name AS evaluator_name, r.erp_push_status = 'RECONCILED' AS is_reconciled FROM result r JOIN student_cache sc ON sc.student_id = r.script_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = ea.evaluator_user_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = ANY(r.source_attempt_ids) WHERE r.erp_push_status <> 'RECONCILED' ORDER BY r.final_marks DESC LIMIT 100;
